dive.title: Dive below Y=40 underwater — reach the ocean floor or a river basin

subtitle.text: Water feeds the farm, fills the barrel, and hides everything worth finding.

description: CH.04 · THE DEEP WATERS
▸ The Long Pour began at a river.
But the river flows somewhere.
Follow it far enough and you reach the ocean.
Follow that down and you find what's underneath.
◈ WATER RESOURCES
└ River: gravel, clay, flint, fresh water
ThirstWasTaken: rivers = Clean water
└ Ocean Shore: kelp, coral, aquatic mobs
└ Ocean Floor: prismarine, buried treasure,
shipwrecks with loot tables
└ Ruins: Ocean Ruins contain important scrolls
(The Drowned World scroll — Ch13 preview)
└ Deep Ocean: Sea Guardians, Elder Guardian loot
◈ AQUAMIRAE (CH08 PREVIEW)
└ The deep ocean is not empty
└ Aquamirae adds: Gates of the Drowned City,
Eel and Orca variants, Thalassophobia fuel
└ ▲ DO NOT explore deep ocean alone in Ch04
└ Wait for Ch08 — proper prep, Water Breathing potions
◈ SCROLL: The Deep Waters
└ Found in: shipwreck chests, underwater ruins,
well structures, drowned mob drops (5%)
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: ocean resource map, Aquamirae warning,
deep water structure awareness
▸ The scroll was sealed in wax.
Something wrote a note on the outside:
'Do not open this until you can breathe down there.'
Open it anyway. Read it above the surface.
▶ Find The Deep Waters scroll [check]
▶ Dive to Y=40 underwater [check]
▶ Collect 8 Prismarine Shards
◇ Water Breathing potion = prismarine shards + pufferfish.
Brew several before the first deep dive.
Ch08 (Below the Waking World) is the ocean chapter.
